    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AuditLog
    Records a structured audit-trail entry every time the annotated method is invoked.
    Masked
    Marks a method parameter, field, or return value as sensitive so that it is redacted before being written to any log output.
    Masked.MaskingStrategy
    Masking strategies available for @Masked.
    SigNozLog
    Injects a private static final SLF4J Logger field named log into the annotated class at compile time, equivalent to Lombok's @Slf4j.
    Traced
    Wraps the annotated method (or all methods of the annotated type) in an OpenTelemetry span, enabling distributed tracing visible in SigNoz.
